The classic shape of the heating bottle filled with natural peat mixture guarantees temperature retention for several times longer than classic water-filled thermophores. Thanks to its easy preparation and application, it is especially suitable for home use. The peat pillow includes a textile cover made of 100% cotton, which prevents initial thermal shock. After heating to the desired temperature (50 - 60°C), it is recommended to test the temperature by touch before applying the pad to the affected area. items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Boldog lazac:                An addictive game you'll want to play all the timeHappy Salmon is a fast and loud movement game that will have you laughing in less than two minutes. This game with simple rules is designed for the whole family and is great as a fun game for kids, school trips, camps, but also as a party game for adults. Players turn over their card, shout out what is on it and try to find the opponent whose card shows the same picture as quickly as possible. Once they find it, they must perform the action shown, then they can put the card down and continue playing. The object of the game is to get rid of all your cards first.  As a challenge, it is also possible to try the TICHOU variant of the Lucky Salmon game. One game of this game lasts only 90 seconds. The Lucky Salmon card game is designed for 3-8 players aged 6 and up.                             6+        recommended age                                3-8 players        number of players                                90 s        length of one game...

Az egyik legjobban felszívódó formában, kelátkötésben van jelen, ami segít maximalizálni a hasznosulást. Számos fontos funkciója van a szervezetben. Például hozzájárul a fáradtság és a kimerültség csökkentéséhez, az idegrendszer és az izmok megfelelő működéséhez. Miért fontos a magnézium? A magnézium-kelát (biszglicinát) a magnézium egyik legjobban hasznosítható formáját tartalmazza magnézium-biszglicinát formájában.
